# Upgrade a 1st gen Cloud Run function to Cloud Run Stay organized with collections Save and categorize content based on your preferences.

Cloud Run functions (created with the Cloud Run Admin API) is the latest version for deploying functions. To upgrade a 1st gen Cloud Run function (created with the Cloud Functions v1 API) to Cloud Run:

*   Understand how 1st gen functions differ from Cloud Run functions running on Cloud Run.
    
*   Learn how to upgrade a 1st gen Cloud Run function to Cloud Run.
